title: phyllanthus niinamii
intro: Phyllanthus niinamii, also known as the Airy Cayenne or Phyllanthus niruri, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus niinamii include its potential to reduce fever, improve digestion, and support liver health. The plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
